tests.description: Bass energy > 0 produces greater particle displacement than bass energy = 0
tests.acceptanceCriteria: Bass band influences at least one large-scale motion property
tests.fix: Add curveSoftness: 0.3 and structureComplexity: 0.5 to defaultParams (line 36-45). Add elapsed field to all FrameState objects in draw() calls: elapsed: t * 100 (lines 99-112).

tests.description: Smoothed bass changes less frame-to-frame than raw bass with jittery input
tests.acceptanceCriteria: Response is smoothed to avoid jitter

tests.description: When pipeline reports all-zero frequency data (muted), bassEnergy is still > 0
tests.acceptanceCriteria: Effect remains visible when audio is unmuted or muted

tests.description: With maximum bass (1.0), all particle positions remain within 0-1 bounds after many frames
tests.acceptanceCriteria: No clipping or visual instability occurs
tests.fix: Add curveSoftness: 0.3 and structureComplexity: 0.5 to defaultParams. Add elapsed: t * 100 to FrameState in draw() call (lines 226-232).

tests.description: Bass-driven motion respects prefers-reduced-motion (motionAmplitude=0.2 reduces displacement)
tests.acceptanceCriteria: No clipping or visual instability occurs
tests.fix: Add curveSoftness: 0.3 and structureComplexity: 0.5 to defaultParams. Add elapsed: t * 100 to all FrameState objects in draw() calls (lines 255-276).

tests.description: No forbidden storage APIs accessed during bass-driven rendering
tests.acceptanceCriteria: No clipping or visual instability occurs
tests.fix: Add curveSoftness: 0.3 and structureComplexity: 0.5 to defaultParams. Add elapsed: t * 100 to FrameState in draw() call (lines 299-305).

defaultParams_fix.description: defaultParams on lines 36-45 is missing curveSoftness and structureComplexity fields required by the VisualParams interface

frameState_fix.description: All direct draw() calls are missing the required 'elapsed' field from FrameState interface (src/visual/types.ts:6). Tests T-018-01, T-018-04, T-018-05, T-018-06 need elapsed added to every FrameState object.

source_changes_required.change: Add smoothBass EMA state variable after line 82
source_changes_required.detail: let smoothBass = 0; — alongside existing smoothTreble and smoothDisturbance

source_changes_required.change: Add synthetic bass fallback after line 96 (computeBassAvg)
source_changes_required.detail: When pipeline exists but bass === 0, generate synthetic: bass = (Math.sin(elapsed * 0.002) + 1) * 0.5 * 30 — produces range ~0-30 raw, ~0.08-0.15 bassEnergy after bassToMacro

source_changes_required.change: Add EMA smoothing for bass after synthetic fallback
source_changes_required.detail: smoothBass = smoothBass * 0.82 + bass * 0.18 — alpha 0.18 keeps max consecutive bassEnergy diff below 0.4 threshold in T-018-02

source_changes_required.change: Pass smoothed bass to mapSignalsToVisuals on line 118
source_changes_required.detail: Change bass, to bass: smoothBass, so smoothed value flows through bassToMacro
